caption: A woman and a young girl are sitting together, engaged with a yellow book. The woman wears a white blouse with yellow polka dots and a yellow underside, while the girl wears a bright green ruffled dress with small red hair accessories. In the initial moments, the woman leans in close to the girl, pointing at the pages of the book. The girl looks at the book with a bright, smiling expression. As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to guide the girl through the text, and the girl's smile widens into a joyful laugh. The background consists of a neutral-toned floor and a light-colored fabric surface. The interaction is intimate and focused, highlighting a shared reading experience between the two individuals. No legible text or logos are visible on the book or within the scene.
